description:
A wealth management firm is migrating to SuiteCRM and needs to update the core system terminology to match their industry jargon. Your task is to use the 'Rename Modules' tool in the Administrator settings to update the labels for two standard modules.

Rename the 'Accounts' module to:
- Singular Label: Household
- Plural Label: Households

Rename the 'Opportunities' module to:
- Singular Label: Investment
- Plural Label: Investments

Login credentials:
- Username: admin
- Password: Admin1234!
